items.title: Fed Rate Decision; UnitedHealth, Apple, Microsoft, Visa Earnings; and Many More Stocks to Watch This Week
items.description: A quarter-point rate cut is all but certain at this week’s Federal Open Market Committee meeting. And we’ll see earnings reports from roughly 160 S&P 500 companies.

items.title: Is UnitedHealth Still a Good Dividend Stock?
items.description: The healthcare stock has plummeted this year, and its earnings have been coming under pressure amid rising costs.

items.title: Big Tech earnings, a crucial Fed meeting, and a Trump-Xi sit-down: What to watch this week
items.description: The market enters the fourth full week of the government shutdown with international trade and domestic rates in focus.

items.title: Wall Street Week Ahead
items.description: Get the latest stock market updates, Q3 earnings highlights, and expert gold investment insights.
